specialization_options.name: Battle Master
specialization_options.description: Tactical maneuvers: reposition, disarm, and trip your foes.

specialization_options.name: Berserker
specialization_options.description: A rage state: bonus damage that burns Stamina each round.

narration_cue: The clash of war narrows to a single choice — cold tactics, or the red tide of rage.

grant.name: Extra Attack
grant.effect: Make 2 attacks per round instead of 1.

narration_cue: Your blade strikes twice where once it struck once.

grant.name: Indomitable
grant.effect: Reroll a failed saving throw, once per combat.

narration_cue: Where lesser warriors falter, you set your jaw and refuse to fall.

grant.name: Legendary Action
grant.effect: Take a full extra action, once per combat.

narration_cue: For a heartbeat the battlefield bends to your will, and you act beyond mortal limit.

specialization_options.name: Bulwark
specialization_options.description: Maximal personal defense: damage resistance and recovery, nearly unkillable.

specialization_options.name: Warden-Commander
specialization_options.description: Party defense: larger auras, stronger buffs, Intercept reaching 10 feet.

narration_cue: Steel and duty pull two ways — to be the unbreakable wall, or the shield over others.

grant.name: Shield Mastery
grant.effect: Shield AC +1; Intercept reduces incoming damage by 1d8 before it applies.

narration_cue: Your shield becomes an extension of will, turning blows before they land.

grant.name: Last Stand
grant.effect: Below 25% HP, allies gain advantage on attacks for 2 rounds and you gain +4 AC.

narration_cue: Bloodied and cornered, you plant your feet — and the line holds.

grant.name: Immortal Sentinel
grant.effect: When reduced to 0 HP, drop to 1 HP instead and gain immunity until end of next turn, once per session.

narration_cue: Death reaches for you and finds only the sentinel, still standing.

specialization_options.name: Blade Dancer
specialization_options.description: Dual-wield mastery: bonus attacks and flowing, unbroken movement.

specialization_options.name: Outrider
specialization_options.description: A ranged-and-melee hybrid with mounted bonuses and longer reach.

narration_cue: The wind of the fight asks which dance you'll lead — close and whirling, or swift and far-ranging.

grant.name: Extra Attack
grant.effect: Make 2 attacks per round instead of 1.

narration_cue: Your strikes blur — two falling in the space of one.

grant.name: Uncatchable
grant.effect: Attacks against you have disadvantage; a miss lets you move 10 feet for free.

narration_cue: Blades pass through the space you just left, and you are already gone.

grant.name: Perfect Strike
grant.effect: Turn one hit into a critical hit, once per combat.

narration_cue: Between breaths you find the perfect line, and the strike lands true.

specialization_options.name: Elementalist
specialization_options.description: Bigger blast damage, elemental resistances, and reshaped terrain.

specialization_options.name: Arcanist
specialization_options.description: Utility, control, counterspelling, and a wider spell selection.

narration_cue: The Weave offers two grips — raw elemental fury, or subtle mastery of the arcane.

grant.name: Spell Mastery
grant.effect: One spell costing 3 or less Focus becomes a 0-cost cantrip.

narration_cue: A favored spell sinks into your bones, free to cast as easily as breathing.

grant.name: Arcane Recovery
grant.effect: Recover Focus equal to your INT modifier, once per combat.

narration_cue: The Weave flows back into you, refilling the well you drew from.

grant.name: Reality Bend
grant.effect: Change any d20 result to any value, once per session.

narration_cue: For one moment the Weave answers a whisper, and what is becomes what you will.

specialization_options.name: Alchemist
specialization_options.description: Potion crafting, healing elixirs, and area concoctions.

specialization_options.name: Battlesmith
specialization_options.description: An enhanced construct, martial proficiency, and INT for weapon attacks.

narration_cue: Your workbench splits in two paths — the flask and the forge.

grant.name: Arcane Armory
grant.effect: Infuse up to 3 items at once, and infuse your construct.

narration_cue: Your creations hum with stored power, three at once and your construct besides.

grant.name: Master Craftsman
grant.effect: Craft at Master tier; async crafting takes half the time; repair Masterwork items.

narration_cue: Your hands know the work so well that time itself bends around the bench.

grant.name: Soul of Artifice
grant.effect: +1 to all saves per infused item (max +4); when reduced to 0 HP, rebound with 1d8+INT, once per long rest.

narration_cue: Your inventions ward you like a second skin, and refuse to let you fall.

specialization_options.name: Diviner
specialization_options.description: Foresight, scrying, and probability — to see the future.

specialization_options.name: Inquisitor
specialization_options.description: Investigation, ward-breaking, and secrets — to read the present.

narration_cue: The unknown beckons two ways — toward what will be, or toward what is hidden now.

grant.name: Arcane Revelation
grant.effect: Ask the DM one magical question and receive a true answer, once per long rest.

narration_cue: You reach past the veil and a single truth answers your asking.

grant.name: Piercing Insight
grant.effect: Your spells ignore resistance and immunity and cannot be Counterspelled.

narration_cue: Your magic finds the seam in any ward and slips through untouched.

grant.name: Omniscience
grant.effect: The DM reveals the single most important hidden truth, once per session.

narration_cue: For one breath the whole of a secret lies open before you.

specialization_options.name: Circle of the Land
specialization_options.description: Expanded spells, terrain powers, and Focus efficiency.

specialization_options.name: Circle of the Beast
specialization_options.description: Enhanced Wild Shape and an animal companion, split between beast and caster.

narration_cue: The wild offers two communions — the deep roots of the land, or the wild heart of the beast.

grant.name: Improved Wild Shape
grant.effect: Access more forms and cast cantrips while shapeshifted.

narration_cue: More shapes open to you, and your magic survives the change of skin.

grant.name: Nature's Wrath
grant.effect: The terrain strikes all grounded enemies for 3d8, no save, once per combat.

narration_cue: The ground itself rises in fury at your command.

grant.name: Archdruid
grant.effect: Wild Shape costs 0 Stamina, you cast in beast form, and your beast form regenerates 5 HP per round.

narration_cue: The line between you and the wild dissolves; you are nature's own voice.

specialization_options.name: Pack Leader
specialization_options.description: Multiple beasts, summoning, and swarm tactics.

specialization_options.name: Alpha
specialization_options.description: One supreme companion that evolves toward sapience.

narration_cue: The bond deepens two ways — toward the many of the pack, or the one of the alpha.

grant.name: Empathic Link
grant.effect: Full telepathy with your companion, which gains +2 to saves; cast cantrips through it.

narration_cue: Your thoughts and your companion's run as one stream.

grant.name: Apex Bond
grant.effect: Your companion's attacks count as magical and heal you 2 HP on hit.

narration_cue: Every strike your companion lands echoes back to you as strength.

grant.name: One Soul
grant.effect: Merge with your companion for 1 minute, combining abilities, HP, and form.

narration_cue: Two hearts beat as one body, and the bond becomes flesh.

specialization_options.name: Sentinel
specialization_options.description: Area defense: the Veil Ward and control of the terrain.

specialization_options.name: Avenger
specialization_options.description: Terrain-empowered melee and a primal smite.

narration_cue: The land asks how you'll guard it — as the still ward, or the avenging storm.

grant.name: Terrain Mastery
grant.effect: Choose a second home terrain; both grant full Rooted benefits.

narration_cue: A second land claims you as its own, and you stand rooted in both.

grant.name: Land's Fury
grant.effect: In your home terrain, deal 3d8 terrain damage to all enemies, once per combat.

narration_cue: The land you guard turns its wrath upon those who trespass.

grant.name: Primeval Champion
grant.effect: In your home terrain, all primal spells cost 0 Resonance and you regenerate 5 HP per round.

narration_cue: In the heart of your land you are unkillable, its champion made manifest.
Your domain is shaped by your patron — the path will reveal itself when that bond is forged.

grant.name: Channel Divinity
grant.effect: Unleash a powerful patron-themed effect, once per combat.

narration_cue: Your patron's power floods through you, ready to be unleashed.

grant.name: Greater Restoration
grant.effect: Remove curses, disease, and level drain, and cure the Hollowed.

narration_cue: Your touch mends what darker powers have broken.

grant.name: Avatar
grant.effect: Channel your deity for 3 rounds: spells cost 0 Focus, gain 60 ft flight, +2d8 radiant on hits, and allies heal 10 HP per hit.

narration_cue: For three rounds the divine wears your face, and the battlefield bathes in holy light.
Your oath is bound to your patron — the path will reveal itself when that bond is forged.

grant.name: Extra Attack
grant.effect: Make 2 attacks per round instead of 1; each can trigger Divine Smite.

narration_cue: Your blade falls twice, and holy fire answers each stroke.

grant.name: Cleansing Aura
grant.effect: Allies within 10 feet gain advantage against the Hollowed.

narration_cue: A radiance spills from you, and the Hollow recoils from those you shield.

grant.name: Divine Champion
grant.effect: Manifest wings of light for 1 minute: 60 ft flight, +2d8 radiant, and heal allies within 30 ft for 10 HP per hit.

narration_cue: Wings of light unfurl, and you become the wrath and mercy of the heavens.

specialization_options.name: Fateseer
specialization_options.description: Divination and foresight — the supportive oracle who guides allies.

specialization_options.name: Doomcaller
specialization_options.description: Curses and probability turned weapon — the offensive oracle.

narration_cue: The threads of fate split before you — to guide what comes, or to unmake it.

grant.name: Temporal Echo
grant.effect: Take a full second turn immediately after your first, once per combat.

narration_cue: Time stutters, and you move twice in the space meant for one.

grant.name: Weave Reading
grant.effect: Your visions turn specific, granting advantage on everything for 1 round, once per session.

narration_cue: The future sharpens into focus, and for a moment nothing can surprise you.

grant.name: Master of Fate
grant.effect: Declare a physically possible outcome and it happens, costing 6 Resonance, once per session.

narration_cue: You speak a possibility aloud, and fate bends to make it so.

specialization_options.name: Assassin
specialization_options.description: First-strike damage, poison, and disguise.

specialization_options.name: Thief
specialization_options.description: Supreme skill mastery, item use as a quick action, impossible acrobatics.

narration_cue: The shadows offer two trades — the killing strike, or the perfect heist.

grant.name: Reliable Talent
grant.effect: On Trained-or-better skills, treat any d20 roll below 10 as a 10.

narration_cue: Your trained hands never truly fumble; even your worst is good enough.

grant.name: Slippery Mind
grant.effect: Gain advantage on WIS and CHA saving throws.

narration_cue: Attempts to grip your mind slide off like water from oiled steel.

grant.name: Death Strike
grant.effect: Your first hidden attack against an unaware foe forces a CON save or deals double damage.

narration_cue: The unseeing never feel you coming, and the first cut may be the last.

specialization_options.name: Handler
specialization_options.description: NPC agents, intel networks, faction infiltration — the spymaster.

specialization_options.name: Operative
specialization_options.description: Solo infiltration, combat from disguise, poison — the field agent.

narration_cue: The game of secrets splits — to run the network, or to be the blade in it.

grant.name: Master of Disguise
grant.effect: Adopt false identities that are immune to non-magical detection.

narration_cue: You wear another's face so completely that no ordinary eye can pierce it.

grant.name: Ghost
grant.effect: Retroactively declare you were present in a past scene, once per long rest.

narration_cue: It turns out you were there all along — you simply chose not to be seen.

grant.name: Puppet Master
grant.effect: Control one NPC for an entire encounter through social manipulation, once per session.

narration_cue: A few chosen words, and another's will becomes yours to steer.

specialization_options.name: Mesmerist
specialization_options.description: Crowd control, mass suggestion, emotional manipulation — the puppet master of groups.

specialization_options.name: Phantasm
specialization_options.description: Illusions, false realities, and misdirection — making you see what isn't there.

narration_cue: The mind opens two doors — to sway the crowd, or to conjure the lie they believe.

grant.name: Unseen Hand
grant.effect: Suggestion affects up to 3 creatures, and Redirect Attention becomes permanent.

narration_cue: Your whispers fan out unseen, turning three minds at once.

grant.name: Deep Erasure
grant.effect: Fog of Mind erases up to an hour of memory; magic below Supreme cannot restore it.

narration_cue: An hour of their life simply ceases to have happened.

grant.name: Ghost in the Machine
grant.effect: Retroactively declare you influenced a past NPC decision, once per session.

narration_cue: That choice they made long ago? Your whisper was behind it all along.

specialization_options.name: College of Valor
specialization_options.description: Medium armor, martial weapons, and Inspiration that fuels combat.

specialization_options.name: College of Lore
specialization_options.description: Two extra Trained skills, expanded spells, and abilities borrowed from other archetypes.

narration_cue: Your song chooses its stage — the clash of valor, or the depths of lore.

grant.name: Magical Secrets
grant.effect: Learn 2 abilities from ANY archetype's list.

narration_cue: No tradition is closed to you now; you borrow power wherever you find it.

grant.name: Superior Inspiration
grant.effect: Begin every combat with a free Inspiration die.

narration_cue: Your song is already rising before the first blow lands.

grant.name: Master Performer
grant.effect: While you are conscious and audible, allies gain +2 to all d20 rolls.

narration_cue: As long as your voice carries, your companions move like heroes of legend.

specialization_options.name: Ambassador
specialization_options.description: Faction diplomacy, treaties, and alliance-building.

specialization_options.name: Provocateur
specialization_options.description: Manipulation, incitement, and information warfare.

narration_cue: The art of words turns two ways — to bind allies, or to set rivals against each other.

grant.name: Voice of Authority
grant.effect: De-escalate affects groups up to 6, and formal Persuasion at DC 15 or less auto-succeeds.

narration_cue: A room full of tempers stills the moment you choose to speak.

grant.name: Kingmaker
grant.effect: Faction reputation gains double, and disposition shifts 2 steps instead of 1.

narration_cue: Your favor moves faster now; loyalties turn at twice the pace.

grant.name: Words That Shape the World
grant.effect: Give a speech: NPCs make a WIS save or become Friendly, with no limit on number.

narration_cue: You speak, and a hostile crowd becomes a sea of friends.

specialization_options.name: Warlord
specialization_options.description: Aggressive tactics: bonus damage on coordinated attacks; Direct Strike improves to +1d8.

specialization_options.name: Sentinel
specialization_options.description: Defensive tactics: Overwatch as a base ability; Rally grants resistance to one damage type.

narration_cue: Command demands a doctrine — press the advantage, or hold the line.

grant.name: Supreme Commander
grant.effect: Direct Strike and Coordinated Assault reach 60 feet, commanding through walls and corners.

narration_cue: Your orders carry across the field, unseen but unfailing.

grant.name: Legendary Tactician
grant.effect: Declare a target and all allies gain advantage against it for 1 round, once per encounter.

narration_cue: You name the weak point, and your whole company strikes it as one.

grant.name: Unbreakable Formation
grant.effect: Allies within 30 ft cannot drop below 1 HP while conscious; you take 1d8 psychic each time this triggers.

narration_cue: Around you no ally falls; their wounds bleed into your resolve instead.
